name: Redox Limited
analysis: RDX has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 2% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.7400, stop A$3.1284, target A$5.5748 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
